Objects.Name: [Module] Matter Splatter Lantern
Objects.Notes: A lantern that creates a matter splatter hole when the player selects it.

Classes.Name: LanternClipArea
Classes.Notes: A lantern that evokes a spherical matter splatter hole when it is selected with the player's cursor, and disappears after a specified amount of time.

Obj_arg0.Name: Sphere Size
Obj_arg0.Description: The size of the spherical matter splatter hole to be created. Default is 750.

Obj_arg1.Name: Grow Time
Obj_arg1.Description: The amount of time in frames it takes for the matter splatter hole to grow when selected. Default is 30.

Obj_arg2.Name: Lifetime
Obj_arg2.Description: The amount of time in frames the matter splatter hole will stay at its maximum size for. Default is 180.

Obj_arg3.Name: Shrink Time
Obj_arg3.Description: The amount of time in frames it takes for the matter splatter hole to shrink at the end of its lifetime. Default is 120.

Obj_arg4.Name: Color Frame
Obj_arg4.Description: The color frame to be used. Default is 0.

SW_A.Description: If used, the lantern cannot be selected until this switch is activated.

SW_B.Description: Activates when the matter splatter hole is fully grown. Deactivates when the hole starts to shrink.
